global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a modern logo and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their spending with a fast signup process.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base for the ad.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'CoinBridge' prominently displayed in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and a smaller circle are centered in the ad, rendered in a lighter shade of orange, creating a minimalist design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle is positioned towards the bottom left, adding a subtle decorative touch to the overall layout.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: The text 'Track every euro Fast signup; instant card' is displayed in a clear, readable font, positioned centrally within the ad.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup;instant card

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The headline 'CoinBridge' is bold and prominent, located at the top of the ad, drawing immediate attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Claim reward' is presented in a contrasting color at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
